calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-22-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Denis Smajlovic Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per via Zoom.
Justin Goodman Attorney for Defendant/Appellant John E. Wai, Trust and Trustee, and 1111 Green LLC. Felix Wai is present.

Parties are sworn.

The Court and Plaintiff/Respondent discuss materials received from Mr. Goodman.

Denis Smajlovic Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on their own behalf.
Mr. Goodman conducts cross examination
Mr. Goodman conducts direct examination of Felix Wai.

Mr. Good man presents the Court with Exhibits 1-9.

Plaintiff/Respondent responds.

The Court has clarifying questions for both parties.
The Court allows the parties to make closing arguments.

Judgment is affirmed in favor of Plaintiff/Respondent; however, the Court will lower the judgment amount. Parties have stipulated to have judgment entered against 1111 Green LLC and not John Wai.

All exhibits are returned to the offering parties.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, not reported, (504).
